# Ariana Aqua Tech

Ariana Aqua Tech provides commercial refrigeration and precision metering systems for Raigad, Thane, and nearby Mumbai Metropolitan Region projects.

## Services

- Daikin cold rooms and commercial deep freezers.
- Virtec and ISOIL flow meters.
- Panda BTU and thermal energy metering.
- Site surveys, sizing guidance, installation, commissioning, calibration coordination, documentation, and after-sales support.

## Contact

- Phone: +91 99676 07445
- Email: suneel@arianaaquatech.com
- Address: B-24, Nisarg Upvan, Patlipada, Near TMC Commissioner Bunglow, Off Ghodbundar Road, Thane (W) 400607.

- Daikin cold room distributor in Raigad
- Commercial deep freezer supplier Thane
- BTU meter installation for buildings
- Commercial refrigeration and precision metering systems
- Flow meters for HVAC water loops
- Virtec flow meter India support
- ISOIL flow meter supplier
- Panda heat meter supplier
